title: Hero metric with masked odometer digit roll
description: A hero stat whose digits spin on masked odometer columns, decelerating into the final figure with a left-to-right wave landing, accent underline, and glow.

params.name: value
params.description: The final figure — up to six characters: digits 0-9 plus at most one separator (. , :). Digits roll; separators stay printed.

params.name: label
params.description: What the number measures — the line under the metric.

params.name: accent
params.description: Brand token for prefix/suffix, underline, and glow.

params.name: settleSec
params.description: Seconds after scene start when the last digit locks (leave >=1s of scene after it).
